writeProgramSettings.title: Program Write Settings
writeProgramSettings.addParallelCommandsFromPreviousStep: Add parallel commands of the previous command to the newly added step
writeProgramSettings.confirmAddParallelCommandToSteps: When a parallel instruction is added to a step, it asks if it should be added to other steps.
writeProgramSettings.removeParallelCommandFromOtherSteps: When a parallel instruction is deleted from a step, it asks if it should be deleted from other steps as well.
writeProgramSettings.changeParallelCommandParameterInOtherSte: When a parameter of a parallel instruction is changed from one step, ask other steps to change it as well
writeProgramSettings.preventParallelUsageForDisabledCommands: Prevent the use of disabled commands in parallel
